name: LLM-ChessCoach
description: AI-powered chess coaching API that combines Stockfish engine analysis with Large Language Models to provide personalized coaching feedback and game analysis.

BACKEND_AUTH_SECRET.description: Signing secret for backend-issued bearer tokens after Apple authentication

APPLE_BUNDLE_ID.description: Production iOS bundle ID used as the Apple identity token audience

APPLE_APPLE_ID.description: Numeric App Store Connect Apple app ID used for production signed-data verification

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string for user entitlements, usage, and App Store purchases

APPSTORE_PRODUCT_ID_30_GAMES.description: Consumable App Store product ID for the 30-game top-up

APPSTORE_ROOT_CERT_PATHS.description: Comma-separated file paths to Apple root certificate PEMs for signed transaction verification

APPSTORE_ISSUER_ID.description: Optional App Store Server API issuer ID for future server lookups

APPSTORE_KEY_ID.description: Optional App Store Server API key ID for future server lookups

APPSTORE_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Optional App Store Server API private key for future server lookups

FREE_GAMES_PER_DAY.description: Number of free trial games available per UTC day

TRIAL_DAYS.description: Number of days the free trial remains active after first backend auth

APPSTORE_GAMES_PER_PURCHASE.description: How many games a successful App Store consumable grants

API_KEY.description: Optional development-only API key bypass for `/v1/*` when Apple auth is not being exercised

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key (or compatible API key from OpenRouter, etc.) for LLM coaching features

OPENAI_MODEL.description: LLM model to use for coaching (default: google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite for cost efficiency)

STOCKFISH_PATH.description: Path to Stockfish binary (installed via Aptfile)

MULTIPV.description: Number of principal variations to analyze (1-5). Higher = more alternatives shown but slower. Recommended: 3 for Standard dynos, 5 for Performance dynos

NODES_PER_PV.description: Stockfish nodes per variation. Higher = more accurate but slower. Recommended: 100000-500000 for Standard dynos, 1000000 for Performance dynos

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: CORS allowed origins (comma-separated). Use * for all origins (not recommended in production) or specify your frontend domain(s)

GUNICORN_WORKERS.description: Number of Gunicorn worker processes. Default is (CPU count * 2 + 1). Standard-1x: 2-4, Standard-2x: 4-8

LICHESS_API_TOKEN.description: Optional: Lichess API token for fetching games from Lichess

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'LLM-ChessCoach deployed successfully! Visit /docs for API documentation.'
